title: Iridium Skyblock
description: A New Era of Skyblock plugins
body:
Skyblock: **Redefined** ![](https://i.imgur.com/2UbOfV2.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/RowZIgQ.png) [![https://iridium-development.gitbook.io/iridiumskyblock/](https://i.imgur.com/tyZEp5T.png)](https://docs.iridiumdevelopment.net/) [![https://github.com/Iridium-Development/IridiumSkyblock](https://i.imgur.com/r0akFp2.png)](https://github.com/Iridium-Development/IridiumSkyblock) [![https://discord.gg/6HJ73mWE7P](https://i.imgur.com/q4gxQfk.png)](https://discord.gg/6HJ73mWE7P) --- ![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/license/Iridium-Development/IridiumSkyblock?color=479fc0) ![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/uVMG0MzO?style=flat&logo=modrinth&logoColor=1bd96a&color=1bd96a) ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/uVMG0MzO?style=flat&logo=modrinth&logoColor=1bd96a&color=1bd96a) ![Spiget tested server versions](https://img.shields.io/spiget/tested-versions/62480?color=479fc0&style=flat) ---
Skyblock is an unofficial game mode for Minecraft that was established in 2011. It was originally a challenge map that contained a single tree, a chest with supplies, and a small cube of dirt, and the player was expected to survive using the resources they had and their knowledge of the game. Now, Skyblock is one of the most popular game modes (following Survival and Creative), spawning thousands of different varieties and twists to pull in new players and sell the idea of a challenge that can be enjoyed with friends. IridiumSkyblock, as with all of Iridium Development's software, aims to deliver a premium image, streamlining the setup process and eliminating the headache of having to figure out the details, while also proving to be extremely configurable to create an unparalleled experience. Every aspect of the plugin has been carefully crafted to suit the server's needs, and between the extensive GUI customization and plethora of extra options, server owners can rest easy knowing that there's a Skyblock plugin out there that fits their needs. *It's this one, if you were wondering.* --- **Features** - An easy to use GUI, fully customizable and ready for players the moment you install the plugin. - A server shop that's easy to use and configure, has both buy and sell features, and allows you to run commands on purchase. - A mission system with tiered missions and mission tracking that updates automatically. - A bank system that supports multiple different currencies, and EXP storage. - A scoreboard that ranks available islands by either island experience or block value. - Team-based cooperative play, complete with permission management and a shared bank for all players of the same island. - Enhancements that make gameplay more interesting; between boosters for temporary improvements to help with specific tasks and upgrades that give fun advantages, players will become and remain engaged. - A border around every island, and the color can be customized by the player. - Islands generate in **all three dimensions**, complete with their own schematics, can be configured. - SQLite support. --- **Requirements** - [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) - Required Dependency **Recommendations** - An economy plugin that supports Vault. - [World Edit](https://enginehub.org/worldedit) or [FAWE](https://intellectualsites.github.io/download/fawe.html). - [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)
